guide:
# Level 1

**Quest NPC:** Master Velihan
Master Velihan asks you to purchase a Caller's Robe and then return to him wearing the robe. You can get this from Merchant Jolral.

---

# Level 2

**Quest NPC:** Master Veljhan
Master Veljhan next sends you to Spiritmaster Anja. She will send you to see Coachman Galdah.

---

# Level 3

**Quest NPC:** Caller Arkhad
Caller Arkhad in the Gate Callers building (upstairs) will send you to retrieve two strands of rat fur from the rats in the Savannah.

---

# Level 5

**Quest NPC:** Master Velihan
Master Velihan wants you to bring him a poison sac. These drop from banded kingsnakes outside town.

---

# Level 7

**Quest NPC:** Master Veljhan
Veljhan wants you to hunt rogue lions and bring him back a tail from one of them.

---

# Level 10

**Quest NPC:** Master Veljhan
1. Talk to Veljhan, who sends you to kill **Skeletal Dogs** (cons yellow). They spawn in ruins directly east from the East Gate of Highbourne in Stoneclaw zone. Kill, loot **Shredded Caller's Robe**, return to Veljhan.
2. Veljhan sends you to kill the traitor **Ganron Blackart** (cons white or yellow) in a ravine to the east. Follow the mountain east, enter the third opening, stay right, find cave. Cast invis before entering to avoid panther. Kill, loot, return to Veljhan.

---

# Level 13

**Quest NPC:** Keeper Toshel
1. Talk to Toshel. He sends you to a graveyard in Druids Watch zone to get a popup which gives you the **Greyweed**. From Highbourne, go north to the river, take a right, keep going until you see the graveyard. You can only get this item when skeletons spawn at night. Once it becomes nightfall, put on invis and start running until you get a message box, then pick the weed. Return to Toshel.
2. Toshel sends you to **Maryan** in Stoneclaw zone, east of Highbourne, through the second valley.
3. Maryan sends you to kill **Spotted Lions** outside the walled town to the west. Kill, loot, return to Maryan.
4. Maryan gives you the book, return to Toshel.
5. Toshel sends you to **Guard Smirg** in the watchtower, north next to the prison in Qeynos Prison zone.
6. Guard Smirg sends you to kill **Hagar Loftlin** (cons yellow), randomly wandering outside the prison, usually NW of the tower. Kill, loot uniform, return to Toshel.

---

# Level 15

**Quest NPC:** Master Veljhan
1. Talk to **Toshel** (down the hall from Master Veljhan), who sends you to **Fenra** at the Library (top floor, right).
2. Fenra sends you back to Toshel.
3. Toshel sends you to **Maryan** in Stoneclaw ravines.
4. Maryan sends you to kill a **Genorous Zombie** (cons white), head north, kill, return to Toshel, then Fenra.
5. Fenra sends you to **Nalej**, at one end of Wyndhaven.
6. Nalej sends you to his fishing boat in the water due south, wait until nightfall, kill **Brownie Thief** (cons white) and his pet crab. Kill, loot, return to Nalej, then Toshel.
7. Toshel sends you to **Vedilion Brthstaw** in the church in Qeynos, return to Toshel.

---

# Level 20

**Quest NPC:** Caller Arkhad
1. Talk to Master Delar. He sends you to **Captain Meruin** at the docks.
2. Captain Meruin sends you to **Farny the Woodcutter** near Melton (north to river, then east). Farny is N-NE from Melton, surrounded by red cons.
3. Farny wants **1,300 tunar**, also sends you to kill **Goretusk the Boar** (cons yellow, NE of Farny). Kill, loot hoof, return to Farny, then Captain Meruin.
4. Captain Meruin sends you to **Maryan** of Aviak Village in Stoneclaw zone. Enter Aviak Village.
5. Maryan sends you to kill **Aviak Chick** (cons white), roaming hills NE of village. Kill, loot No Trade Captured Aviak Chick, return to Maryan, return star charts to Captain Meruin.
6. Captain Meruin sends you to **Mayor Reively** in Wyndhaven. Walk the road to find him.
7. Mayor Reively sends you to kill **Blinkbart Bagglebaff** (cons yellow) on a hill east of windmill and smith shop. Kill, loot, return to Mayor, then Captain Meruin, then Master Delar.

**2,814,929 XP**, choose from:
- **Frozen Mark** (increases the toughness of your pet; gives it a damage shield and increases its attack)
- **Lava Stone** (summons a stone with three charges of Lava Strike, a fire-based direct damage spell)
